This skill is used when the user enters /A-share thermometer, /thermometer, /a-share or asks: Should A-shares be bought or sold, is it a bull market or a bear market now, what is the current state of A-shares, the temperature of A-shares, is the market hot or not, should the position be increased or reduced now, etc. Based on the five major indicators of price-to-earning ratio, margin financing balance, IPO, risk premium, and profit cycle + market width correction, the market temperature and investment suggestions from 0 to 100 degrees are output.
